name: Broccoli with Assorted Flavors
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the broccoli into long stalks and florets.
2. Peel off any tough skin (if necessary).
3. In a large pot of vigorously boiling salted water, blanch broccoli for 4 minutes.
4. Drain and immediately plunge the broccoli into ice water to refresh it.
5. Heat sesame oil in a wok until hot but not smoking.
6. Add the broccoli and stir-fry garlic and ginger for 2 minutes until aromatic.
7. Add the remaining ingredients (soy sauce, fish sauce, vinegar, chicken stock, sugar, MSG) and toss to mix well.
8. Remove from heat.
9. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the broccoli to a bowl.
10. In the wok, add sesame oil to the liquid.
11. Adjust seasoning to taste; you may not need much salt.
12. Pour the liquid over the broccoli.
13. Marinate for at least 3 hours before serving.
14. Serve at room temperature.
Yield: 4 servings
